valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Thu 21 May 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 22 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low mid Atlantic 990 losing its identity by midday tomorrow. High belgium 1029 expected austria 1030 by same time
